summary.lv: Accenture Rīgā meklē SAP Integrations Consultant, kas projektē un izstrādā integrācijas starp SAP un trešo pušu sistēmām, izmantojot SAP PO/PI, SAP CPI, IDocs, BAPIs un web tehnoloģijas (XML, JSON, REST, SOAP).
summary.en: Accenture in Riga is hiring an SAP Integrations Consultant to design and build integrations between SAP and third-party systems using SAP PO/PI, SAP CPI, IDocs, BAPIs and web technologies (XML, JSON, REST, SOAP).
